google.title: Google Calendar
google.description: Sync your TeachingPlanner calendars with Google Calendar
google.notConnectedDescription: Connect your Google account to sync calendars
google.disconnectSuccessDescription: Your Google account has been disconnected and events have been removed from Google Calendar.
google.connectSuccessDescription: Your Google account is now connected. You can enable sync for your academic calendars from 'Manage Synchronizations'.
google.connectErrorDescription: Could not connect your Google account. Please try again.
google.step1: Connect your Google account to authorize access. This will create sync entries for all your academic calendars
google.step2: Go to 'Manage Synchronizations' to enable or disable sync for each academic calendar
google.step3: When you enable a calendar, Google Calendar calendars will be automatically created for each classroom that has events
google.step4: Events are distributed to classroom calendars based on their location. Each classroom has its own Google Calendar
google.step5: Synchronization is manual. Use the 'Sync Now' button in 'Manage Synchronizations' to sync events
google.step6: Changes in TeachingPlanner (new events, modifications, deletions) will be reflected in Google Calendar when you run the sync
google.note: Important note: Synchronization is one-way (TeachingPlanner → Google Calendar). Changes made directly in Google Calendar are not synced back to TeachingPlanner.

infoNote.label: Note:
infoNote.text: When you enable an academic calendar and sync it, Google Calendars will be automatically created for classrooms that have events in that calendar. Events are distributed to classrooms based on their location. Sync is manual — use the "Sync now" button to update calendars.

toggleSuccess.title: Status updated
toggleSuccess.description: The sync status has been updated

toggleDisabled.title: Sync disabled
toggleDisabled.description: Events from this calendar have been removed from Google Calendar

deleteDialog.title: Remove synchronization
deleteDialog.description: All events from the {{degreeName}} calendar, year {{courseName}}, {{semester}} will be removed from Google Calendar. This action cannot be undone.

card.title: Academic Calendars
card.description: Enable or disable synchronization of academic calendars with Google Calendar

quota.title: Google Calendar API Usage (shared service)
quota.description: Limits are shared across all users of the system. Values are estimates based on known Google Calendar API limits — Google does not publish exact quota values.

syncErrors.tokenExpired: Google session expired. Go to Settings and reconnect your Google account.
syncErrors.rateLimit: Too many requests to Google Calendar. Wait a moment and try again.
syncErrors.quotaExceeded: Google Calendar usage limit reached. Try again later.
syncErrors.serverError: Temporary Google Calendar error ({{status}}). Try again in a few minutes.
syncErrors.networkError: Network error connecting to Google Calendar. Check your internet connection.
syncErrors.partialFailure: {{created}} calendars created successfully. {{failed}} failed: {{classrooms}}. Please try again.
syncErrors.unknown: Unexpected Google Calendar error (code {{status}}). Please try again.
syncErrors.SYNC_INTERRUPTED: Sync was interrupted. Please try again.
